title: 1 Speciedaler - Christian V (Accession)

obverse.description: Laureate and armored bust of King Christian V with long and curly hair facing right. King wears a band with the pendant of the Order of the Elephant and a scarf around the neck; more his armor has a lion head on shoulder. Legend along rim.
obverse.lettering: CHRISTIANUS· V· D· G· REX · DAN· NOR· VAN · GOT·
obverse.lettering_translation: Christian V, by the Grace of God, King of Denmark, Norway, the Wends and the Goths

reverse.description: Laureate bust of King Frederik III in high armor, wearing an ermine mantle, a scarf around neck and a collar with pendant of the Order of the Elephant. Legend around portrait cut in two by laurel wreath.
reverse.lettering: FRID·III· D· G· DAN  |  NOR · VAN · GOT· REX·
reverse.lettering_translation: Frederik III Dei Gratia King of Denmark (DAN), Norway (NOR), the Wends (VAN) and the Goths (GOT)

commemorated_topic: Death of King Frederik III and accession of Christian V to the throne of Denmark
